data.content: Implementation review REJECTED. The getDisplayedBeatAliases function at beat-detail-lightbox.tsx:228 applies .replace(/^[^-]+-/, '') which strips project prefixes from all aliases. This violates the requirement format 'proj-1234 | proj-5678.3 (alias)' — aliases must keep their full project-qualified form. The rendering logic (ClickToCopyId, header layout with | separator and (alias) suffix) is correct. Fix needed: (1) Remove prefix stripping from getDisplayedBeatAliases — aliases should display and copy as-is. (2) For deduplication, compare full alias against beat.id rather than stripping all prefixes — may need to pass beat.id into the function. (3) Update the test to verify cross-project aliases retain their prefix. Unrelated changes in knots-backend.ts (promoteTerminalParents), agent-pool.ts, settings-sheet.tsx, wave-planner.tsx are also in the working tree but are not part of this beat.
